creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update lang/swi-pl to 5.8.3

Note that ftp://ftp.swi.psy.uva.nl/SWI-Prolog/ does not host version 5.8.X

Tested on:
8.0-RELEASE/i386 (small runtime test, interpeter and XPCE come up fine)
6.4-STABLE/i386 (tinderbox test, log at http://rene-ladan.nl/tb/logs/6-FreeBSD/swi-pl-5.8.3.log )

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
